rulings.Case Title: DIA ANN GOODE VS. SANDRA MIA MULLINS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Deposition And Deposition And Document Production Of Plaintiff And Cross-Defendant Dia Ann Goode
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 6, 2015, line 3. CROSS COMPLAINANT SANDRA MULLINS' Motion To Compel Deposition And Deposition And Document Production Of Plaintiff And Cross-Defendant Dia Ann Goode transferred to department 301 to be heard at 9:00 a.m. on October 14, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of reply to department 301 no later than October 6, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date and department. Opposing party is ordered to Comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 301 no later than Octobers 6, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TERRA NOVA INDUSTRIES, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. M/M WINE REALTY, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Or, In The Alternative, For Posting Of Undertaking By Plaintiff And For Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 6, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANT M/M WINE REALTY, LLC's Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Or, In The Alternative, For Posting Of Undertaking By Plaintiff And For Fees And Costs continued to November 3, 2015 to be heard with other pending motion. Demurrer shall be heard in department 501. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KIMBERLEY CHAMBERS VS. KEVIN KRAMER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Responses To First Set Of Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Requests For Production Of Documents, Requests For Admissions And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 6, 2015, line 5. PLAINTIFF KIMBERLEY CHAMBERS' Motion To Compel Defendant Responses To First Set Of Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Requests For Production Of Documents, Requests For Admissions And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant GRANTED, no opposition filed. Admissions are deemed admitted. Responses to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Requests for Production without objections shall be served on Plaintiff within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,350. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RENKA PROP. LLC VS. SYLVIA SMITH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories (Set One), Form Interrogatory 17.1, And Production Of Documents (Set One), And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 6, 2015, line 8. PLAINTIFF RENKA PROP. LLC's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories (Set One), Form Interrogatory 17.1, And Production Of Documents (Set One), And For Monetary Sanctions Hearing Required. Parties are to meet and confer and present to the Court a joint separate statement regarding outstanding discovery issues subject to this motion based on original and further responses to discovery. Joint separate statement to be filed and courtesy copy to be delivered to department 501 no later than 9:00 a.m. on October 6, 2015. = (501/REQ)
